# Notes for Claude

## Durable rules

- **Regenerate example data whenever generation code changes.** If you touch `scripts/generate_demo_data.py`, anything under `preprocess/preprocess/`, or the `.arrow` schema, re-run:
  ```bash
  python scripts/generate_demo_data.py --out demo-data
  python -m preprocess.cli demo-data --out viewer/public/graph \
    --title "Synthetic gut microbiome pangenome" \
    --description "Demo dataset: 120 genomes × 300 bins (core/shell/cloud) generated by scripts/generate_demo_data.py"
  ```
  Both `demo-data/` and `viewer/public/graph/` are gitignored (CI regenerates them on every deploy), but regenerating locally confirms the pipeline still works end-to-end.
